description: Project-owned command execution policy for workflows where the user or project has selected a required tool or transport.

release_publish.description: Publishing a Project Governor release should use GitHub CLI or GitHub REST API commands instead of falling back to plain git push.

required_any_patterns.message: Release publishing must record a GitHub CLI release command.
Release publishing may use GitHub REST API through gh api.

disallowed_patterns.message: Release publishing is configured for gh/GitHub API transport; do not use plain git push unless the user explicitly approves an override.
